'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 75''' was the seventy-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 4]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|The Trade Federation Attack]]
*[[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]]
*The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]
*[[Aiwha/Legends|Aiwhas]]
*[[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth - Asteroid Belt]]
*[[:Category:Droid manufacturers|Droid Manufacturers]]
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]]
*[[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing]]
